$comment: Proof-fixture catalog (ADR-0002). dart run build_runner build projects this into fixture.g.dart (typed factory registry) and fixture.g.json (LLM tool schema). Edit THIS file, then re-run the builder; the generator-in-sync test guards the committed artifacts.

catalog.name: fixture
catalog.description: Proof fixture binding real genesis_tree Seeds for the genesis_taxonomy test suite.

panel.description: A named container component. Holds an ordered list of child components referenced by id.

label.description: A leaf component holding a single named string value. Cannot have children.

gauge.description: A leaf gauge readout exercising every prop kind. Cannot have children.

scale.description: Full-scale reading the gauge tops out at.

enabled.description: Whether the gauge responds to actions.

align.description: Needle alignment within the gauge face.

set.description: Overwrite this gauge's reading with context.value (number, required). Last write wins.

reset.description: Return this gauge's reading to zero. Takes no context.
